findings.label: Local entity clarity
findings.evidence: Found 3/3 core identity signals across title/meta/headings/body.
findings.recommendation: Put the exact business name, city/service area, and primary category in the homepage H1, title tag, footer, and About/Contact copy.

findings.label: NAP/contact accessibility
findings.evidence: Contact terms: 2; phone pattern detected: True.
findings.recommendation: Expose phone, address/service area, hours, and contact CTA in plain text; avoid hiding core details only inside images.

findings.label: Structured data/schema
findings.recommendation: Add LocalBusiness/Organization JSON-LD with name, phone, URL, address/service area, opening hours, sameAs links, and service catalog.

findings.label: Buyer-answer content
findings.recommendation: Create concise FAQ, cost, comparison, emergency/same-day, and service-area answer sections that AI systems can quote directly.

findings.label: Trust and proof density
findings.recommendation: Add first-party review excerpts, license/insurance language, warranty details, years in business, photos, and proof-backed claims.

findings.label: Service/content architecture
findings.recommendation: Build separate pages for the top services, common problems, pricing ranges, and service areas; link them from homepage navigation.

findings.label: Technical crawl basics
findings.evidence: Title: True; meta: True; words: 87; robots: not checked; sitemap: not checked.
findings.recommendation: Ensure each important page has a unique title/meta description, 300+ useful words, crawlable HTML, robots.txt, and sitemap.xml.

extracted.title: River City HVAC | Cincinnati Heating & Cooling
extracted.meta_description: River City HVAC provides emergency furnace repair, AC installation, and maintenance in Cincinnati, OH.
headings: River City HVAC in Cincinnati, OH
